name: @mppfy/c2pa-verify
description: MPP-compatible service for verifying C2PA content provenance manifests.

scripts.deploy: echo 'Use deploy:staging or deploy:prod. Top-level deploy disabled — it overwrites the production Worker with dev config (same script name + custom domains carry over).' && exit 1
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply c2pa-verify-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply c2pa-verify-prod --remote --env production
